changes.description: Removed redundant issue-number references ([Issue #389], [Issue #162]) and design-review IDs ([DR1-001], [DR2-001], [DR3-001], [DR4-001], [DR1-003], [DR1-006], [DR1-009]) from inline comments. Consolidated verbose JSDoc comments into concise descriptions that explain purpose without redundant implementation details. The component-level JSDoc already documents the feature list.

Extracted waitForEditorReady() helper function to replace 44 identical occurrences of the waitFor(() => expect(textarea).toBeInTheDocument()) pattern across test cases. Removed redundant [DR3-003] comment from test describe block. Reduces test boilerplate by ~90 lines while preserving all test logic and assertions.

summary: Refactoring focused on two areas: (1) Cleaned up MarkdownEditor.tsx comments by removing redundant issue-number and design-review ID references while keeping meaningful descriptions. The component-level JSDoc already provides full feature documentation, so inline issue references were noise. (2) Extracted a waitForEditorReady() test helper in MarkdownEditor.test.tsx to eliminate 44 identical await/waitFor/expect blocks, improving test readability and maintainability. No functional changes were made. All 4266 tests continue to pass with 0 TypeScript and 0 ESLint errors.
